ground_truth.title: Catering Services - Visit Lebanon Valley, Pennsylvania
ground_truth.main_content:
FEATURE THE TASTES OF THE LEBANON VALLEY AT YOUR NEXT EVENT. Every event is special so why not entertain your guests with flavors that are equally special. The Lebanon Valley has catering services that can make sure your event has something delicious for everyone!

FEATURED CATERING SERVICES:

Café Haj Paj - Annville, PA - Café Haj Paj offers bold, scratch-made cuisine through their quaint café, expert catering, and popular food truck—perfect for events, parties, and festivals across Central Pennsylvania.

Chef on the Go – Chef Rebecca Briody - Mount Gretna, PA - From extravagant buffets to simple hors d'oeuvres, Chef on the Go is always a good idea when it comes to catering events both large and small!

Mancino's Pizza & Catering - Lebanon, PA - Mancino's has been serving the Lebanon Valley with delicious pizza for over 40 years. Visit their pizza shop in the Lebanon Valley Mall, order for delivery, or call for catering for your next event!

Country Home Catering - Lititz, PA - This catering service features menus for 40 to 800 people with delicious, scratch-made dishes that will impress at any event!

Elaine's Catering - Lebanon, PA - With over 35 years in the catering business, Elaine's Catering is a great option for full catering services, professional bartending, and drop-off meals!

Hebron Catering - Lebanon, PA - Hebron Catering and Events Inc. offers expert catering and event hosting for weddings, parties, banquets, and more. Known for exceptional service, delicious food, and tasteful event design, they ensure every occasion is memorable.

Heisey's Diner – Catering - Lebanon, PA - Heisey's Diner offers affordable catering for weddings, banquets, and events, providing homemade meals, cakes, appetizers, and more. With a spacious banquet facility and excellent service, Heisey's Diner ensures memorable occasions.

Iron Valley Catering – Iron Valley Golf Club - Lebanon, PA - The Miner's Pub at Iron Valley Golf Club offers a variety of catering options including hors d'oeuvres, entrees, and sides for events of all types and sizes.

Lancaster Cupcake - Lebanon, PA - Delight in delicious gourmet cupcakes, cake shakes, JarCakes, and so much more at Lancaster Cupcake! Visit their adorable shop and don't forget to check out their event space and catering for birthdays, weddings, and more.

Martin's Roast A Pig – Catering - Lebanon, PA - Martin's Roast-A-Pig specializes in whole pig roasts and full-service catering for weddings, parties, and corporate events. Serving Central PA, they deliver delicious, slow-roasted meats and unforgettable hospitality.

QT Catering - Lebanon, PA - QT Catering offers affordable, restaurant-quality catering for weddings, parties, and corporate events. Their banquet hall seats up to 175 guests and includes linens, seating, and more.

Swatara Coffee Co. - Jonestown, PA - Swatara Coffee Company offers a full espresso menu with our freshly roasted coffee, made-to-order breakfast and lunch sandwiches, avocado toast, and a variety of sweet treats. Enjoy dining-in or grabbing-and-going.

The Timeless Cafe - Lebanon, PA - A breakfast & lunch restaurant committed to serving food made-from-scratch with the freshest ingredients possible.

Gin Mill - Lebanon, PA - The Gin Mill is a locally owned and operated family restaurant and tavern featuring 24 beers on draft and a great wine selection.
with: Every event is special so why not entertain your guests with flavors that are equally special.
The Lebanon Valley has catering services that can make sure your event has something delicious for everyone!
Café Haj Paj offers bold, scratch-made cuisine through their quaint café, expert catering, and popular food truck.
From extravagant buffets to simple hors d'oeuvres, Chef on the Go is always a good idea when it comes to catering events.
